name: Jiangsu Apon Medical Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Apon Medical Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of medical devices in China. Its principal products include microcomputer injection pumps, disposable injection pumps, wireless analgesia management systems, and pulse oximeters, as well as medical devices, such as sensors in the field of pain management and nasal care sprayers in the field of nasal care. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Nantong, China.
